headline: Markets pivoted to risk-off as geopolitical tensions with Iran escalated, sending gold to $4,673 and…

rows.k: US University of Michigan Consumer Con

telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Apr 2, 2026 Markets pivoted to risk-off as geopolitical tensions with Iran escalated, sending gold to $4,673 and lifting the VIX to 23.87. The flight-to-safety crushed risk assets, with crypto leading the decline as BTC fell to $66,937 while Treasury bonds caught defensive flows. Late-cycle dynamics are emerging amid stagflation concerns. CLOSING PRICES BTC: $66,937 · ETH: $2,068 · SOL: $79.17 · GOLD: $4,673 · SPY: $655.83 (+0.8%) · QQQ: $584.98 (+1.4%) · VIX: $23.87 (-2.7%) · TLT: $86.79 (+0.1%) · DXY: $100.01 (+0.4%) · OIL: $112.06 (+11.9%) SECTOR CLOSE ▲ XBI (Biotech) +3.4% · XLE (Energy) -3.9% · XLU (Utilities) +2.2% ▼ ITA (Aerospace/Defense) +0.9% · XLY (Consumer Disc) -0.5% · XLV (Healthcare) +0.6% SIGNALS — Crypto / Bitcoin
